title: tobocop2/lilbee

MCP server for coding agents, web crawler, TUI, CLI, REST API, Python library. No Ollama or LM Studio needed, works with both.

title: AashishH15/Lexicon
summary: A local-first, offline writing assistant. Grammar, rewriting & tone entirely on your machine.

title: gonzaloMorenoc/Mnemo

title: hung12ct/culi
summary: Self-improving context & memory for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex. One canonical knowledge store injected only when relevant — hooks push budgeted context, an MCP server serves depth on demand, and it learns lessons from your sessions. Agent memory + context engineering as a single static Go binary.
